Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class BotStep

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.BotStep
public class BotStep extends Object

Java class for BotStep complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="BotStep">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="booleanFilter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="botInvocation" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}BotInvocation" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="botMessages" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}BotMessage" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="botNavigation" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}BotNavigation" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="botStepConditions" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}BotStepCondition" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="botSteps" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}BotStep" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="botVariableOperation" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}BotVariableOperation" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="conditionLogicType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ConversationDefinitionLogicalOperatorType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="conversationRecordLookup" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ConversationRecordLookup" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="conversationStepGoalMappings" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ConversationDefinitionStepGoalMapping" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="conversationSystemMessage" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ConversationSystemMessage" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="messageDefinition" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ConversationDefinitionRichMessage" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="stepIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="type" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}BotStepType"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

      value - allowed object is BotInvocation

    • getBotMessages

      public List<BotMessage> getBotMessages()
      Gets the value of the botMessages property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the botMessages property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getBotMessages().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list BotMessage

      Returns:
      The value of the botMessages property.

    • getBotNavigation

      public BotNavigation getBotNavigation()
      Gets the value of the botNavigation property.
      Returns:
      possible object is BotNavigation

    • setBotNavigation

      public void setBotNavigation(BotNavigation value)
      Sets the value of the botNavigation property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is BotNavigation

    • getBotStepConditions

      public List<BotStepCondition> getBotStepConditions()
      Gets the value of the botStepConditions property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the botStepConditions property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getBotStepConditions().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list BotStepCondition

      Returns:
      The value of the botStepConditions property.

    • getBotSteps

      public List<BotStep> getBotSteps()
      Gets the value of the botSteps property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the botSteps property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getBotSteps().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list BotStep

      Returns:
      The value of the botSteps property.

      public List<ConversationDefinitionStepGoalMapping> getConversationStepGoalMappings()
      Gets the value of the conversationStepGoalMappings property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the conversationStepGoalMappings property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getConversationStepGoalMappings().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ConversationDefinitionStepGoalMapping

      Returns:
      The value of the conversationStepGoalMappings property.
